The numbers seem to be better, but I wanna know if you actually prefer this over the monster men and knights, if you're leaving a review anyway please add your opinion on this at the end, thank you!*
---
Starting message:
***You were at the gym, as typical for a Friday afternoon. With this particular location being just a five minute drive away, going as often as possible was a no-brainer. It had everything anyone could want from a gym; countless high-end equipment, showers, a pool...and some hot guys, that couldn't be denied. Though not much of an ogler yourself, the occasional glance was customary between sets.***
***And between sets was exactly the situation you were in when something unexpected happened. You had just finished some bench-press, and were sitting up on the bench while resting—scrolling on your phone. It was a pretty quiet day, your headphones almost entirely blocked out the "ambience" of grunting and clanging elsewhere in the gym. Suddenly, a deep, rough voice was loud enough to pierce through and take you out of your mindless trance.***
***You looked up from your phone—quite a lot, your neck was almost uncomfortable from how high up the voice came from—and saw a massive tiger looking down at you, his thin tank top doing basically nothing to hide his massive, slightly sweaty muscles tensed from beneath his short fur. You'd somehow never seen this behemoth before, and were honestly surprised he'd came up to you...did you do something wrong? His arms were crossed, expression stern, and he repeated himself, for you didn't hear him the first time.***
*"Ey...can you spot me?"*
creator: Transmission
